news.title: CHP'den istifa ettikten sonra AKP'ye katılan Nimet Özdemir kimdir?
news.summary: 17 Haziran'da CHP'den istifa eden İstanbul milletvekili Nimet Özdemir, AKP'ye katıldı. 24 Haziran'daki AKP'nin Meclis Grup Toplantısında Özdemir'e rozetini Cumhurbaşkanı ve AKP Genel Başkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan taktı.

news.title: ABD Kongresi'nden Trump'a İran çıkışı: 'Ya savaşı bitir ya onayımızı al'

news.title: Power outages hit France as record heatwave set to peak
news.summary: The heatwave is expected to spread to other parts of western Europe on Wednesday, before extending eastwards over the weekend.

news.title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
news.summary: The resolution passed on Tuesday was largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.

news.title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
news.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

news.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
news.summary: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

news.summary: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.

news.title: France confirms first Ebola case
news.summary: More than 260 people in the Democratic Republic of Congo are known to have died during the current outbreak.

news.title: Brazil vs Scotland World Cup 2026: Preview, prediction, team news, lineups

news.title: Kenya braces for return of Gen Z protests – how did they begin?

news.title: How to stay cool and treat heatstroke during a heatwave
news.summary: Heatstroke is a severe medical condition that occurs when a human body’s internal temperature exceeds 40C (104F).

news.summary: Global Sumud Flotilla group says six others remain in detention and are expected to be released within 24 hours.

news.title: Congress passes major housing bill. And, Mamdani-backed candidates sweep NYC primaries
news.summary: Congress has passed the largest housing affordability bill in decades. And all three candidates endorsed by New York City mayor Zohran Mamdani have won their primaries.

news.title: 4 ways to design a dreamy summer, according to a happiness expert
news.summary: Don't let the season fly by. Gretchen Rubin, host of the Happier podcast, shares exercises to help you get what you want out of summer. Fill out the printable worksheet and stick it on your fridge.

news.title: In the Ebola epicenter, a gold-mining town reacts with fear, disbelief and grit
news.summary: NPR reports from Mongbwalu in the Democratic Republic of Congo. The fight to contain the virus faces obstacles from lack of supplies to residents who doubt that the virus is real.

news.title: 5 years after the Surfside condo collapse, the toll of the tragedy remains
news.summary: Surfside, Florida, is marking five years since a beachfront condominium collapsed, killing 98 people. It was one of the largest structural failures in U.S. history.

news.title: Why are crisis pregnancy centers saying they can 'rule out' ectopic pregnancy?
news.summary: Under President Trump, more federal attention and support has gone towards anti-abortion Christian centers. A watchdog group says many of them mislead patients with promises to "rule out" ectopic pregnancies.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
